---
title: "Get used to scientific UAV applications"
id: assessment-hs
order: 50
summary: "Prepare your working environment."
modules:
  - module-hs
Goals:
  - module-goals-hs
materials:
  - material-hs-0
  - material-hs-1
  - material-hs-2
activities: []
labels:
  - self-check
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/assessment-hs.md"
---

## Task

Please familiarize yourself with the following software packages. Install the packages on your laptop and check if they are running.

- [QGroundControl](https://docs.qgroundcontrol.com/master/en/getting_started/download_and_install.html)
- [OpenDroneMap](https://www.opendronemap.org/)
- [uavRmp](https://gisma.github.io/uavRmp/)

## Connected Module

- [Scientific UAV Hardware](../modules/module-hs.qmd)
